extra.reason: Completed Phase 1: RuntimeAdapter interface, MissionPacket schema, roach-pi adapter stub, runtime registry, and integration tests. Full interface definitions stable. Ready to proceed with Phase 2 Magnets integration.

Completed Phase 2: Magnets integration (Execution, Cost, Confidence magnets) with roach-pi adapter. MagnetSynthesis aggregates reports into unified confidence scores and recommendations. All 3 magnets collect telemetry from execution, tests, budget usage. Integrated into adapter with proper type safety. Ready for Phase 3 CMP gates.

Completed Phase 3: CMP Governance Bridge (Intent, Scope, Confidence gates) + BeadsBridge for bead conversion. Intake gates (Intent/Scope) validate before execution. Confidence gate (post-execution) uses magnet synthesis to quality-gate results. BeadsBridge converts tasks/anomalies/learnings into structured Chromatic Beads (action/alert/learning/score). Full governance flow tested and working.

Completed Phase 4: Console REST API with full mission/gates/beads endpoints. MissionStore provides in-memory persistence. ConsoleServer implements all CRUD handlers (missions, beads, gates, health). Intake gates run on mission creation. All 6 integration tests pass. Ready for Phase 5 WebSocket/auth/database.

Completed Phase 5: Sandbox Lab with L0-L5 promotion ladder for agent safety. SandboxValidator enforces level constraints (dry-run → read-only → simulated → sandboxed → draft PR → trusted). PromotionScorer evaluates readiness based on execution count, success rate, confidence, violations. SandboxLab orchestrates lifecycle with auto-promotion/demotion. All 6 integration tests pass. Agent trust profiles fully tracked.
Completed: removed stray runtime dirs, added audit report and PDR, updated gitignore for tsbuildinfo, synced beads issues, pushed to origin. Pre-push E2E gates all passed.
Completed: all ruff lint errors fixed (0 remaining), all files formatted, unawaited coroutine fixed (AsyncMock→MagicMock for httpx Response), 70 tests pass with 0 warnings. Pushed to origin.
Completed: all ruff lint errors fixed (0 remaining), all files formatted, unawaited coroutine fixed (AsyncMock→MagicMock for httpx Response), 70 tests pass with 0 warnings. Pushed to origin.
Completed: all ruff lint errors fixed (0 remaining), all files formatted, unawaited coroutine fixed (AsyncMock→MagicMock for httpx Response), 70 tests pass with 0 warnings. Pushed to origin.
Completed: all ruff lint errors fixed (0 remaining), all files formatted, unawaited coroutine fixed (AsyncMock→MagicMock for httpx Response), 70 tests pass with 0 warnings. Pushed to origin.
Closed 6 duplicates, kept chromatic-harness-v2-6kt as the canonical smoke-test issue.

Completed: src/chromatic_router/ is an incomplete scaffold (missing core modules). 02_RUNTIME/router/ is the current canonical runtime source with 62% line coverage. Added .coveragerc defaulting coverage to 02_RUNTIME/router so pytest --cov works without explicit path. All 70 tests pass. Pushed to origin.

Completed: mypy 1.19.1 installed, mypy.ini configured, all type errors resolved (0 errors in 36 source files). SDK adapters use Any for _client, HTTP adapters use httpx.AsyncClient | None. Added type: ignore for dynamic imports. All 70 tests pass. Pushed to origin.

All 10 remediation issues completed:
- W1: Git cleanup
- W2: 53 ruff lint errors → 0 (F401, F841, E401, E741, E402)
- W2-D: Unawaited coroutine fixed
- W3: Coverage aligned to 02_RUNTIME/router/ (62%)
- W4: 7 duplicate smoke-test issues deduped
- W5-A: CI workflow updated with ruff + format + coverage
- W5-B: Import strategy docs added
- W5-C: mypy passes 0 errors

Quality gates: ruff(0), format(clean), pytest 70 passed, mypy(0), E2E(PASS), pushed to origin.
